title: Metrics Mind Map — Visual Relationship and Report Diagram
story: As a data analyst, I want to view a mind-map diagram of a metric's relationships, linked reports, and dashboards, so that I can visually understand how metrics influence each other and where they appear.
description:
Implements a GoJS-powered mind map that visually renders a selected metric's relationships. The diagram displays:

- Left side: 'Influenced by' branch with sub-branches for 'Segmented by', 'Impacted by', and 'Included in the calculation', populated from metric link data.
- Right side: 'Has influence on' branch with sub-branches for 'Segment of', 'Directly Impacts', and 'Included in Calculation', plus 'Dashboards' and 'Reports' branches showing linked Salesforce reports and dashboards.

Each metric node is clickable to open its sidebar detail panel without leaving the page. Reports and dashboards link to their Salesforce URLs.

Accessible via a visualization icon next to the edit icon on the metrics table. The diagram opens in a modal that fits within the user's viewport, with dark mode support (canvas background: #111C42).
acceptance_criteria: Mind map renders 'Influenced by' and 'Has influence on' branches with correct sub-categories
Linked metrics appear under their respective relationship type nodes
Dashboards and Reports branches show on the right side with clickable Salesforce links
Clicking a metric node opens its sidebar detail panel
Visualization icon appears next to the edit icon in the metrics table
Modal fits within the user's viewport
ux_changes: GoJS mind map in a modal. Left side: 'Influenced by' with Segmented by / Impacted by / Included in calculation. Right side: 'Has influence on' with Segment of / Directly Impacts / Included in Calculation, plus Dashboards and Reports. Clickable metric nodes open the sidebar. Visualization icon in the metrics table. Responsive modal. Dark mode canvas background.
middleware_changes: Endpoint aggregates metric link relationships, reports, and dashboards for the selected metric to power the mind map data model.
implementation_notes: Uses GoJS mind map sample as the base. Developer initially built a separate page but converted to a modal at the product owner's suggestion for better UX flow.
comment_summary: Extensive iterative development. Developer built initial prototype, discovered data display issue (metrics not appearing due to testing on wrong environment), fixed it. Product owner requested dark mode background color, dashboard/report mapping, and label changes. Developer added responsive modal and viewport fitting. Both sides collaboratively refined layout and interaction.
